title: [HMI] Bow's animation
description: This package adds animation for the bow when you press Shift
body:
📢 Description:

This package adds animation for the bow when you press Shift.

My first project (supplement) do not judge strictly. 😊🙏

🔧 Requirements:

For normal versions, requires [HOLD MY ITEMS 5.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)
